LanguageData.ChemfuelTank.description: An astrofuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship.
LanguageData.ChemfuelTank.label: small astrofuel tank
LanguageData.GravcorePowerCell.description: A power generator that passively draws a small amount of energy from gravitational waves passing through the gravship. Adjacent gravcore power cells will multiply their power output by 15% for each gravcore power cell.
LanguageData.GravFieldExtender.description: An ultratech device used to increase the size of a gravship. It extends the area in which substructure can be built, and increases the amount of substructure that a gravship can support. Must be built near a grav engine. A gravship can support up to ten grav field extenders.
LanguageData.LargeChemfuelTank.description: A massive astrofuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship.
LanguageData.LargeChemfuelTank.label: large astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VGE_Agrocell.description: An enclosed, space-efficient growing unit designed for use on gravships. Built into the floor for unobstructed movement, it features integrated sunlamps and a nutrient system that must remain powered, as plants will die if power is cut.
LanguageData.VGE_Agrocell.label: agrocell
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.description: A small-sized box containing large uranium shells. Used by different gauss artillery turrets to reload. A box is fed directly into an adjacent gravship artillery when it needs to be reloaded.
LanguageData.VGE_AmmoBox_GaussShell.label: gauss shell ammo box
LanguageData.VGE_AnticraftCaster.description: A medium gravship-mounted energy weapon that fires short, razor-sharp bursts of cutting beam with surgical precision. Built to punch holes through critical systems, the caster trades sustained suppression for rapid, accurate strikes. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. Uses a lot of power to fire.
LanguageData.VGE_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_OxygenPack.description: A utility pack containing a large supply of compressed oxygen. When worn with vacuum-sealed apparel, it provides full immunity to vacuum by supplying breathable air. The pack only consumes oxygen while in vacuum and must be periodically reloaded. It also dramatically reduces exposure to pollution through the lungs.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_OxygenPack.label: oxygen pack
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige.description: A protective suit that keeps the user safe in the vacuum of space. The suit restricts the wearer's movement, considerably reducing their movement speed.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige vacsuits like this is usually made for those of high status in the royal navy. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_Vacsuit_Prestige.label: prestige vacsuit
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_VacsuitHelmet_Prestige.descr: A helmet that efficiently recycles the user's oxygen, allowing them to breathe in the vacuum of space for hours at a time. The process isn't perfectly efficient, so the user must periodically return to a pressurized environment.\n\nExpensive and beautiful, prestige vacsuit helmet like this is usually made for those of high status in the royal navy. Embedded eltex threads also enhance the wearer's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VGE_Apparel_VacsuitHelmet_Prestige.label: prestige vacsuit helmet
LanguageData.VGE_Astrofire.label: astrofire
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofireSpark.label: astrofire spark
LanguageData.VGE_Astrofuel.description: A high-energy synthetic fuel. Used to power gravship thrusters and boosters, or to generate electricity in specialized systems. Extremely combustible, it burns violently even in low-oxygen environments.
LanguageData.VGE_Astrofuel.label: astrofuel
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelDrain.description: A hopper-like storage structure meant to input astrofuel into the network, filling up connected tanks.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelDrain.label: astrofuel drain
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.description: Produces power by consuming astrofuel. Much more efficient than chemfuel generators.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelGenerator.label: astrofuel generator
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipe.description: A large pipe for transporting high-grade astrofuel around. Unlike other pipes, itâ€™s big, bulky, acts as cover and canâ€™t be stood on. Astrofuel pipes canâ€™t be placed on workbench interaction spots and in doorways.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelPipe.label: astrofuel pipe
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.description: A specialized structure that refines chemfuel into high-grade astrofuel. It must be connected to the astrofuel pipe network and linked to at least one astrofuel tank to operate. Once connected, it automatically converts inserted chemfuel into astrofuel for use in engines and systems.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelSynthesizer.label: astrofuel synthesizer
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelTap.description: A hopper-like storage device meant to hold dispensed astrofuel for use later.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelTap.label: astrofuel tap
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelValve.description: Switches astrofuel flow on and off.
LanguageData.VGE_AstrofuelValve.label: astrofuel valve
LanguageData.VGE_Astronaut.description: A medium sized mechanoid designed to perform construction and firefighting tasks in orbit. It can perform blunt melee attacks if necessary. It is not affected by the slow space traversing speeds.
LanguageData.VGE_Astronaut.label: astronaut
LanguageData.VGE_Astronaut.tools.0.label: torso
LanguageData.VGE_Astropede.description: Heavily armored mechanoids adapted for zero-G warfare. Astropedes drift silently through space using gravitic stabilizers, unleashing explosive kinetic barrages from their minified mass lances. Their hovering profile makes them ideal for shipboard assaults and station breaches, though their slow movement speed leaves them vulnerable to concentrated fire.
LanguageData.VGE_Astropede.label: astropede
LanguageData.VGE_Astropurifier.description: A gravtech unit that enhances the precision and stability of astrofuel refinement. When placed next to an astrofuel synthesizer, it enables perfect 1:1 conversion from chemfuel to astrofuel, though the process takes twice as long.
LanguageData.VGE_Astropurifier.label: astropurifier
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster beam
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_GaussGun.label: Gauss gun shot
LanguageData.VGE_Bullet_MassDriver.label: mass driver shot
LanguageData.VGE_CapacitorHarmonizer.description: A specialized device that balances and synchronizes energy flow between nearby capacitors. It passively boosts their charge and discharge efficiency to peak performance. Requires power to operate.
LanguageData.VGE_CapacitorHarmonizer.label: capacitor harmonizer
LanguageData.VGE_CommsTerminal.description: A compact version of a comms console that allows radio contact with other factions and orbital traders. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CommsTerminal.label: comms terminal
LanguageData.VGE_CompactBiosculpterPod.description: A miniaturized version of the biosculpter pod, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. It performs a variety of biological alterations including age reversal and pleasure-giving. The pod biotunes to its user at the end of a cycle. While biotuned, it cannot be used by anyone else, but cycles will complete 25% more quickly. Biotuning resets if the pod is unused for 80 days. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactBiosculpterPod.label: compact biosculpter pod
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered drug lab designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it’s equipped with containers, heaters, and measurement devices for producing various drugs. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactDrugLab.label: compact drug lab
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered fabrication bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it’s equipped with advanced tools for producing technological marvels from simpler materials. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactFabBench.label: compact fabrication bench
LanguageData.VGE_CompactGeneBank.description: A miniaturized version of the gene bank, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. It stores genepacks and makes them usable for creating new xenogerms when placed near a gene assembler. It draws power directly from the grav engine and prevents genepacks from deteriorating while slowly repairing deterioration.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactGeneBank.label: compact gene bank
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered machining table designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it’s ideal for assembling machinery like guns and ammunition, or breaking down dead mechanoids. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMachiningTable.label: compact machining table
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMultiAnalyzer.description: A miniaturized version of the multi-analyzer, designed to work aboard a gravship. While taking up less space, it performs the same essential function: increasing research speed when placed near a high-tech research bench and unlocking advanced projects. Each bench can only benefit from one multi-analyzer. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactMultiAnalyzer.label: compact multi-analyzer
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered biofuel refinery designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it refines biological matter like wood or plant matter into chemfuel. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactRefinery.label: compact biofuel refinery
LanguageData.VGE_CompactResearchBench.description: A miniaturized version of the high-tech research bench, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. Despite its compact size, it features the same computers and electronic equipment, providing the same research capabilities and unlocking advanced projects as its larger counterpart. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactResearchBench.label: compact research bench
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered smithy designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it can be used to smith non-mechanical weapons and tools, as well as extract usable metal from slag chunks. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactSmithy.label: compact smithy
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered stove designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, it contains a high-efficiency cooktop and integrated prep surface, as well as a butchering slate. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactStove.label: compact stove
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.description: A space-efficient, gravship-powered tailor bench designed for use aboard gravships. Despite its smaller frame, this workbench comes with a sewing machine for rapid tailoring of clothes. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CompactTailor.label: compact tailor bench
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Gold.description: Gold-rich strata crushed and recrystallized into a tight, resilient vein. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Gold.label: compressed gold ore
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Jade.description: Jade-bearing vacstone compacted into a rigid, fine-grained mass. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Jade.label: compressed jade
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Plasteel.description: Ultra-dense plasteel conglomerate formed in vacuum over generations; brutally tough to mine. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Plasteel.label: compressed plasteel
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Silver.description: Silver-bearing rock compacted under extreme pressure into a dense, uniform seam. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Silver.label: compressed silver ore
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Steel.description: Ancient structural mass fused into a single, ultra-dense vacstone-steel deposit. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Steel.label: compressed steel
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Uranium.description: Uranium-laden rock sintered into a nearly monolithic deposit, difficult to fracture. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Uranium.label: compressed uranium ore
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Vacstone.description: An ultra-dense mass of asteroid rock and dust, compacted over millennia into a near-indestructible block. Found only in deep space.
LanguageData.VGE_Compressed_Vacstone.label: compressed vacstone
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.description: An auxiliary interface that allows a copilot to assist in launching and piloting a gravship. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_CopilotConsole.label: copilot console
LanguageData.VGE_CrewBunkBed.description: A compact double-tiered bed designed for gravship use. Maximizes limited space by allowing two crew members to rest in the footprint of one bed.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewBunkBed.label: crew bunk bed
LanguageData.VGE_CrewLockers.description: A set of compact lockers designed for gravship crew quarters. Provides a small comfort bonus to all nearby bunk beds. Placing more than one locker near the same bed has no effect.
LanguageData.VGE_CrewLockers.label: crew lockers
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedEscapePod.description: A crashlanded, damaged escape pod. Can be hacked open to reveal what's inside.
LanguageData.VGE_DamagedEscapePod.label: damaged escape pod
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringConsole.description: An interface used to monitor the maintenance status of all gravship components. It draws power directly from the grav engine.\n\n<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay impact:</color> Reduces maintenance sensitivity of all gravship structures on this gravship by 0.5.
LanguageData.VGE_EngineeringConsole.label: engineering console
LanguageData.VGE_EscapePodSkyfaller.label: escape pod (incoming)
LanguageData.VGE_FauxPlant.description: An artificial plant in a sturdy metal pot. It requires no light, water, or air, making it perfect for adding beauty to even the most inhospitable gravship environments.
LanguageData.VGE_FauxPlant.label: faux plant
LanguageData.VGE_Filth_Astrofuel.label: astrofuel puddle
LanguageData.VGE_Filth_DamagedSubstructure.label: damaged substructure debris
LanguageData.VGE_FlightComputer.description: An advanced computational unit that optimizes data collection during gravship travel. Increases the amount of gravdata gained from each launch.
LanguageData.VGE_FlightComputer.label: flight computer
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.description: A small, single-barrel electromagnetic cannon that launches dense uranium slugs at extreme velocities. Designed for both local bombardments and medium-range engagements, it can also target other gravships in orbit. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GaussGun.label: gauss gun
LanguageData.VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.description: A monumental astrofuel storage tank that supplies fuel for thrusters on a gravship.
LanguageData.VGE_GiantAstrofuelTank.label: giant astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VGE_GiantThruster.description:
A massive, reinforced astrofuel thruster built with advanced alloys and ultra-dense vacstone plating. It massively increases the range and maximum size of the gravship. Thrusters require an unobstructed area free of large buildings and gravship substructure.

Requires vacstone blocks, which can be obtained from orbital asteroids.

A gravship can support up to four giant thrusters.
LanguageData.VGE_GiantThruster.label: giant thruster
LanguageData.VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.description: A massive gravtech reactor that channels and amplifies gravitational wave energy into immense electrical output. Its reinforced coils can handle extreme flux, making it one of the most potent power sources available for gravships. Adjacent gravcore power cells will multiply the power output by 15% for each gravcore power cell.
LanguageData.VGE_GravcorePowerCoil.label: gravcore power coil
LanguageData.VGE_GravFieldAmplifier.description: An advanced ultratech device that dramatically increases the size of a gravship. It extends the area in which substructure can be built, and increases the amount of substructure that a gravship can support. Must be built near a grav engine. A gravship can support up to four grav field amplifiers.
LanguageData.VGE_GravFieldAmplifier.label: grav field amplifier
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.description: A specialized thermal sink that draws all residual heat from the grav engine, instantly clearing its cooldown. The absorbed heat leaves the gravheat absorber inoperable for an extended period while it safely dissipates the stored energy. Furthermore, the specialized design provides protection from the heat of solar flares encountered in space, preventing excessive heat from bleeding into the gravship's interior.
LanguageData.VGE_GravheatAbsorber.label: gravheat absorber
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.description:
The gravhulk is a colossal class of gravship, engineered to transport entire megacolonies, orbital platforms, or mobile city-cores across the skies of a planet. The grav engine generates lift by inverting and intensifying the effect of gravity in a field around itself. This engine can lift upwards, but does not produce forward thrust. It can't function far from a large gravity well like a planet, so it is useless for interplanetary travel.

When launched, anything on substructure that's connected to the grav engine will be transported to a new map.

Gravhulks are the pride of glitterworld infrastructure fleets, often used to deploy prefabricated settlements, floating arcologies, or deep-strata excavation hubs. Their sheer scale demands enormous production facilities and crew specialization, making them one of the rarest and most powerful gravships ever built.
LanguageData.VGE_GravhulkEngine.label: gravhulk engine
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.description:
A compact gravtech engine designed for short-range jumps within a planetâ€™s atmosphere. The gravjumper engine creates a brief, localized distortion in gravitational flow, allowing rapid vertical lift, but does not produce forward thrust. It can't function far from a large gravity well like a planet, so it is useless for interplanetary travel.

When launched, anything on substructure that's connected to the grav engine will be transported to a new map.

Often used by explorers, scouts, and smugglers, gravjumper engines are prized for their agility and minimal power requirements. They are simpler to produce than full gravship engines, but still rely on high-grade materials and advanced fabrication.
LanguageData.VGE_GravjumperEngine.label: gravjumper engine
LanguageData.VGE_Gravlift.description: A complex vertical launch and stabilization platform integrated into the gravshipâ€™s core structure. The gravlift provides the immense thrust required for vertical takeoff from planetary surfaces and stabilizes orbital insertion, allowing the gravship to remain suspended in space. It also softens the crash landing greatly, reducing the damage taken and ensuring substructure does not suffer critical damage.
LanguageData.VGE_Gravlift.label: gravlift
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBasicRecharger.description: A miniaturized version of the mech recharger, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. Lightweight mechanoids can recharge here. During recharge, this recharger produces toxic wastepacks and stores them internally. Haulers must remove the wastepacks from time to time. It draws most of the power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBasicRecharger.label: compact mech recharger
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBlackBox.description: An indestructible advanced recorder integrated into the gravshipâ€™s systems. It greatly increases gravdata yield, captures any overflow that would normally be wasted, and allows stored gravdata to be converted directly into research points. A gravship can support only one black box.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipBlackBox.label: gravship black box
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipCapacitor.description: Stores high amounts of electricity for later use. Constructed in the gravship substructure, gravship capacitors do not obstruct movement.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipCapacitor.label: gravship capacitor
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipScannerCluster.description: An advanced multi-frequency sensor cluster used by researchers to detect resources underground, across the planet, or in orbit. The scanner can be tuned to target specific minerals underground, or over long range, or set to scan for orbital objects. Detection rates depend on the operator's research ability. Buried resources will require deep drills to extract, while distant mineral deposits and orbital objects must be visited to be collected. Building multiple units does not increase the frequency of orbital detections. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipScannerCluster.label: gravship scanner cluster
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipShelf.description: A reinforced storage shelf designed for use aboard gravships. Items stored in this will not affect room beauty and they won't deteriorate, even if outside.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipShelf.label: gravship shelf
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStandardRecharger.descriptio: A miniaturized version of the large mech recharger, designed to fit within the confined spaces of a gravship. Medium, heavy, and ultraheavy mechanoids can recharge here. During recharge, this recharger produces toxic wastepacks and stores them internally. Haulers must remove the wastepacks from time to time. It draws most of the power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStandardRecharger.label: compact large mech recharger
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStructuralBeam.description: A structural beam around which a gravship can be constructed. It extends the area in which substructure can be built in a 5x5 square. If destroyed, it causes adjacent beams to collapse.
LanguageData.VGE_GravshipStructuralBeam.label: gravship structural beam
LanguageData.VGE_GravtechConsole.description: An interface used to analyze gravdata gathered from gravship launches and travel. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_GravtechConsole.label: gravtech console
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_AnticraftCaster.label: anticraft caster
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_GaussGun.label: gauss gun
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.descripti: A heavy pulse-charged weapon for mechanoid defense.
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.label: heavy charge annihilator
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_JavelinPod.label: javelin pod
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_MassDriver.label: mass driver
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_PointDefense.description: A rapid-fire gun for point-defense applications.
LanguageData.VGE_Gun_PointDefense.label: point defense gun
LanguageData.VGE_GunnerSubpersonaCore.description: A low-grade subpersona specialized in gravship combat. It can link with a single gravship artillery piece and control it the same way a crewmember manning a targeting terminal can. It's combat capabilities are beyond that of even the best human gunner. A gravship can support up to two gunner subpersona cores.
LanguageData.VGE_GunnerSubpersonaCore.label: gunner subpersona core
LanguageData.VGE_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.description: A heavy pulse-charged weapon, designed for sustained suppressive fire in defense of mechanoid orbital platforms. Its upgraded capacitors and cooling systems allow it to unleash longer, more devastating bursts than standard charge blasters, saturating entire areas with surprisingly accurate shots.
LanguageData.VGE_HeavyChargeAnnihilator.label: heavy charge annihilator
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenAstrofuelPipe.description: A hidden, reinforced tube for transporting high-grade astrofuel around. While itâ€™s not visible, it is much more expensive to construct.
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenAstrofuelPipe.label: hidden astrofuel pipe
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenOxygenPipe.description: A hidden, reinforced tube for moving oxygen around. While itâ€™s not visible, it is much more expensive to construct.
LanguageData.VGE_HiddenOxygenPipe.label: hidden oxygen pipe
LanguageData.VGE_Hunter.description: A fast, human-sized combat mechanoid designed for zero-gravity warfare. It drifts effortlessly through space, closing in on the target before unleashing devastating salvos from the twin-linked javelin launcher. While the missiles strike with lethal precision, their short range forces hunters into dangerous proximity with the enemy.
LanguageData.VGE_Hunter.label: hunter
LanguageData.VGE_Hunter.tools.0.label: head
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.descrip: Produces a large amount of power by consuming astrofuel. Much more efficient than chemfuel generators.
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialAstrofuelGenerator.label: industrial astrofuel generator
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialOxygenPump.description: A powerful unit that releases large amounts of oxygen into the surrounding room, allowing enclosed areas to repressurize in space. Essential for long stays in orbit.
LanguageData.VGE_IndustrialOxygenPump.label: industrial oxygen pump
LanguageData.VGE_JavelinPod.description: A compact multi-tube missile platform that launches a volley of six guided astrofuel javelins. Meant for fast, hard-hitting strikes against exposed gravships and unarmored surface forces. Requires a linked targeting terminal with an operator to function. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_JavelinPod.label: javelin pod
LanguageData.VGE_LandingStructure.label: landing structure
LanguageData.VGE_LargeAsteroid.label: large asteroid
LanguageData.VGE_LargeDebris.label: large debris
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.description: A large thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine cooldown duration. A gravship can support up to six large heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeHeatsink.label: large heatsink
LanguageData.VGE_LargeMechanoidThruster.description: A massive astrofuel thruster built by the mechanoid core to propel their orbital platforms. Its construction mirrors human design but is reinforced with mechanical precision and efficiency, lined with thick vacstone plating that shrugs off extreme heat and stress. These thrusters allow mechanoid platforms to maneuver and maintain position in orbit. While unusable for human gravships, destroying one will yield a small supply of precious vacstone blocks.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeMechanoidThruster.label: large mechanoid thruster
LanguageData.VGE_LargeOxygenTank.description: A large oxygen tank that supplies oxygen to pumps throughout the gravship.
LanguageData.VGE_LargeOxygenTank.label: large oxygen tank
LanguageData.VGE_LifeSupportSystem.description: A vital device that processes harvested oxyalgae into breathable oxygen. Converts biomass into gas and pumps it into the oxygen network to supply pressurized rooms and equipment.
LanguageData.VGE_LifeSupportSystem.label: algae oxygenator
LanguageData.VGE_MaintenanceHub.description: A centralized system that optimizes and automates routine upkeep across the gravship. It passively reduces the maintenance decay rate of all connected machinery. Requires power to work.
LanguageData.VGE_MaintenanceHub.label: maintenance hub
LanguageData.VGE_MassDriver.description: A triple-barrel electromagnetic artillery system built into mechanoid defense platforms. It fires dense slugs at incredible velocities, tearing through both armored gravships in orbit and ground targets with equal ease. The weapon is fully autonomous, operated by a machine brain that requires no crew. Commonly seen on orbital bombardment platforms.
LanguageData.VGE_MassDriver.label: mass driver
LanguageData.VGE_MassLance.description: A mechanoid-mounted portable mass driver artillery. It fires dense slugs at incredible velocities, capable of destroying even heavily armored gravships.
LanguageData.VGE_MassLance.label: mass lance
LanguageData.VGE_MassLance.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidAstrofuelNode.description: A compact fuel reservoir integrated into mechanoid platforms. It stores refined astrofuel for their systems, but when damaged it is highly unstable and prone to violent explosions.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidAstrofuelNode.label: astrofuel node
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidGravEngine.description: The cold, artificial heart of a mechanoid orbital platform. Unlike human-built grav engines, these are constructed by the mechanoid core itself, optimized for ruthless efficiency and unending operation. They generate immense lift and stabilization fields that allow entire platforms to remain suspended in orbit, forming the backbone of mechanoid dominance in space. While largely incompatible with human systems and not usable for gravship construction, they can be destroyed to yield a gravcore, a rare and valuable prize for any who dare to challenge them.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidGravEngine.label: mechanoid grav engine
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidPodLauncher.description: A mechanized launch bay that periodically fires drop pods packed with mechanoids. These pods strike distant targets or nearby ships, allowing the platform to project its forces far beyond its hull.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidPodLauncher.label: mechanoid pod launcher
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidResourceProcessor.descripti: A machine-built structure that sustains mechanoid platforms by breaking down cosmic debris and wreckage into usable resources. It operates at regular intervals, steadily producing metals and fuels needed to keep their orbiting strongholds supplied.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidResourceProcessor.label: resource processor
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidTempShield.description: A compact defense unit that projects a localized shield around itself. The barrier activates only for a short time before collapsing, after which the device must cool down before it can deploy again.
LanguageData.VGE_MechanoidTempShield.label: mechanoid temp shield
LanguageData.VGE_MedbayBed.description: A specialized gravship bed equipped with an integrated vitals monitor. Designed for medbays, it improves medical outcomes over normal beds. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_MedbayBed.label: medbay bed
LanguageData.VGE_MediumAsteroid.label: medium asteroid
LanguageData.VGE_MediumDebris.label: medium debris
LanguageData.VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore.description: A high-grade subcore specialized in gravship combat. It can link with a single gravship artillery piece and control it the same way a crewmember manning a targeting terminal can. Itâ€™s combat capabilities are subpar, but it allows for autonomous artillery batteries without the need for human operators.
LanguageData.VGE_OperatorSubpersonaCore.label: operator subpersona core
LanguageData.VGE_Oxyalgae.description: A dense mat of harvested aquatic algae, cultivated for use in life support systems. Oxyalgae provides steady oxygen generation but spoils quickly if not processed.
LanguageData.VGE_Oxyalgae.label: oxyalgae
LanguageData.VGE_OxyalgaePlant.description: A fast-growing aquatic plant cultivated in hydroponics and used to generate oxygen when converted in algae oxygenator. Rots quickly when harvested, making immediate processing essential.
LanguageData.VGE_OxyalgaePlant.label: oxyalgae plant
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanister.description: A life-sustaining gas. Used to pressurize rooms, supply breathable air, or fuel specialized equipment and survival gear. Volatile when damaged.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanister.label: oxygen canister
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterEmptier.description: A hopper-like storage structure meant to input oxygen from canisters into the network, filling up connected tanks.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterEmptier.label: oxygen canister emptier
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterFiller.description: A hopper-like storage device meant to hold dispensed oxygen in canisters for use later.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenCanisterFiller.label: oxygen canister filler
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenHarvester.description: A device that draws in breathable oxygen from the surrounding atmosphere and stores it in the oxygen network. It functions only on planetary surfaces with an atmosphere and will not operate in vacuum or low-oxygen environments.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenHarvester.label: oxygen harvester
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenPipe.description: A reinforced tube for moving oxygen around. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenPipe.label: oxygen pipe
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenReclaimer.description: A self-contained atmospheric unit that extracts trace oxygen from surrounding gases. It produces oxygen at a slow, steady rate, but requires no input materials. Needs to be connected to an oxygen tank via oxygen pipes to work.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenReclaimer.label: oxygen reclaimer
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenValve.description: Switches oxygen flow on and off.
LanguageData.VGE_OxygenValve.label: oxygen valve
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravhulk. It draws power directly from the gravhulk engine.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotBridge.label: pilot bridge
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.description: An interface that allows launching and piloting a gravjumper. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_PilotCockpit.label: pilot cockpit
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.description: A specialized defensive turret built exclusively for gravships. It intercepts explosive projectiles and incoming drop pods within its protective radius, but cannot engage ground targets. Interception chance scales with the targetâ€™s velocity.
LanguageData.VGE_PointDefenseTurret.label: point defense turret
LanguageData.VGE_Rocket_JavelinRocket.label: Javelin rocket
LanguageData.VGE_RocketswarmPod.description: A mechanoid-mounted, minified, twin-linked rocketswarm launcher. It is very effective against large groups of weaker combatants, but less effective against small numbers of armored targets.
LanguageData.VGE_RocketswarmPod.label: rocketswarm pod
LanguageData.VGE_RocketswarmPod.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.VGE_SealantGoop.description: A hardened mass of rapidly-expanding polymer foam. Produced by a sealant popper, it forms an airtight plug that seals breaches in gravship rooms exposed to vacuum. While effective at restoring pressure, it is brittle and easy to destroy.
LanguageData.VGE_SealantGoop.label: sealant goop
LanguageData.VGE_SealantPopper.description: When it detects vacuum levels above 25%, this safety device pops and releases a fast-expanding sealant goo. The substance quickly solidifies, sealing gaps and breaches to restore pressure in the room. Can also be triggered manually.
LanguageData.VGE_SealantPopper.label: sealant popper
LanguageData.VGE_SmallAsteroid_Projectile.label: small asteroid
LanguageData.VGE_SmallDebris.label: small debris
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.description: A compact thermal regulator that absorbs heat from gravship travel and slowly converts part of it into usable power while preventing system overheating and decreasing the grav engine cooldown duration. A gravship can support up to ten small heatsinks.
LanguageData.VGE_SmallHeatsink.label: small heatsink
LanguageData.VGE_SmallOxygenTank.description: An oxygen tank that supplies oxygen to pumps throughout the gravship.
LanguageData.VGE_SmallOxygenTank.label: small oxygen tank
LanguageData.VGE_SolarPanelling.description: Produces electricity from sunlight. Does not work in the dark or under artificial light. Does not obstruct movement or provide cover, but can only be constructed on the gravship substructure.
LanguageData.VGE_SolarPanelling.label: solar panelling
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.description: A control station dedicated to operating a single gravship artillery piece. Requires a crew member to manually aim and fire the weapon. It draws power directly from the grav engine.
LanguageData.VGE_TargetingTerminal.label: targeting terminal
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierDouble.label: vac barrier (2x1)
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierQuintuple.label: vac barrier (5x1)
LanguageData.VGE_VacBarrierTriple.label: vac barrier (3x1)
LanguageData.VGE_VacCheckpoint.description: A safety checkpoint indicating the entrance to vacuum environment. Colonists will not cross it without required vacuum resistance.
LanguageData.VGE_VacCheckpoint.label: vac checkpoint
LanguageData.VGE_WallFirefoamPopper.description: A wall-mounted variant of the firefoam popper. When it detects fire, it bursts and sprays fire-retardant foam in a circular area around itself. Can also be triggered manually.
LanguageData.VGE_WallFirefoamPopper.label: wall firefoam popper
LanguageData.VGE_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.description: A wall-mounted version of an orbital trade beacon, required for orbital trading. You can only sell goods to orbital traders if they're near an orbital trade beacon. Can be placed indoors.
LanguageData.VGE_WallOrbitalTradeBeacon.label: wall orbital trade beacon
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.description: A wall-mounted version of a tool cabinet. Increases work speed when placed near a workbench. One workbench can use up to two tool cabinets.
LanguageData.VGE_WallToolCabinet.label: wall tool cabinet
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedGravExtender.description: This device once expanded a gravshipâ€™s build area, but it is now shattered. Some valuable parts can still be reclaimed.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedGravExtender.label: destroyed grav field extender
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedLargeThruster.description: This powerful thruster once pushed gravships across space, but now it lies broken. Even ruined, it holds some useful salvage.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedLargeThruster.label: destroyed large thruster
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.descrip: This tank once stored astrofuel for thrusters, but it has been destroyed. Its frame still holds recoverable materials.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallAstrofuelTank.label: destroyed small astrofuel tank
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.description: This heatsink once cooled the gravshipâ€™s systems, but it has burned out. Some steel can still be recovered from the wreck.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallHeatsink.label: destroyed small heatsink
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.descriptio: This tank once supplied oxygen to the gravship, but itâ€™s now broken and useless. Some steel can still be salvaged from it.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallOxygenTank.label: destroyed small oxygen tank
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallThruster.description: This thruster once powered the gravship, but it is now wrecked beyond use. Scraps of metal and components can still be taken.
LanguageData.VQEA_DestroyedSmallThruster.label: destroyed small thruster
